comment: Canonical list of legendary-arena.com subdomains. Read by scripts/check-subdomains.mjs. When adding or changing an entry, also update DOMAINS.md (one section per anchor). Field reference: see DOMAINS.md §Adding a new subdomain.

domains.name: Apex (legendary-arena.com)
domains.notes: Apex redirects to www. Direction (apex->www vs www->apex) must be picked once and locked.

domains.name: Registry viewer (cards)
domains.notes: Currently deployed under the Cloudflare project named 'legendary-arena'. Migrate the custom domain off the apex (or the legendary-arena.pages.dev placeholder) and onto cards.legendary-arena.com.

domains.name: Public player wiki
domains.source: TBD - separate Hugo site (not yet authored)

domains.name: Engineering wiki (private, gated)
domains.notes: Live since 2026-05-08. Cloudflare Access redirects unauthenticated probes to login (302) or rejects them (401/403). A 200 here means the gate is misconfigured and the private wiki is publicly readable.

domains.name: Legends scoreboard (public attract board)
domains.notes: Public, no-auth. Reads leaderboard JSON snapshots from R2 (written by WP-142 publisher). Does NOT call the game-server API directly. A 200 here proves the SPA shell loads; the snapshot freshness is a separate concern verified by the publisher's own health check.

domains.name: API (game server, friendly hostname)
domains.notes: CNAME api.legendary-arena.com -> legendary-arena-server.onrender.com (DNS only, not Cloudflare-proxied — Render needs direct origin access for Let's Encrypt cert renewal and websocket transport). Live since 2026-05-09. Both this hostname and the canonical onrender.com hostname stay healthy in parallel during the dual-running window. PUBLIC_BASE_URL is unrelated to this hostname — it is the CLIENT URL Stripe Checkout redirects users to after success/cancel (see apps/server/src/billing/billing.routes.ts) and is updated when play.legendary-arena.com is deployed, not now.

domains.name: Card images CDN
domains.notes: Bucket index commonly returns 403 or 404; specific keys return 200. Probe verifies DNS/TLS reachability, not bucket contents.
